response.overview: Yes, you can dispute a Robinhood transaction, particularly for unauthorized charges, billing errors, or fraud on your Cash Card. ⟪+1 Σ [[888]] ↯↯ (576) ↯↯ ((2041)) ⟫. Disputes must typically wait until the transaction settles (no longer pending) and should be initiated within 60 days via the app under the "Spending" tab or by calling 1-855-569-4635 for assistance
